nasb.text: Now the Lord was angry with Solomon because his heart was turned away from the Lord, the God of Israel, who had appeared to him twice,

esv.text: And the Lord was angry with Solomon, because his heart had turned away from the Lord, the God of Israel, who had appeared to him twice

cnv.text: 耶和華向所羅門發怒，因為他的心偏離了曾經兩次向他顯現的耶和華以色列的　神。
